_comment: IANA root KSK trust anchors as published at https://data.iana.org/root-anchors/root-anchors.xml. Captured 2026-05-04. Update when the upstream XML changes (rare — KSK rollovers are signalled months in advance). The 19036 key is past its validUntil (2019) and is included for historical-vector tests only; production deployments should configure 20326 + 38696.
